ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component functionality */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the component belongs to */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Button, Modal) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is currently active */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation */,
  "accessibility_guidelines" TEXT /* Accessibility guidelines for the component */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage code snippets */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the button style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button style */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style is the default style for the component */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class name for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the button size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button size */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is the default size for the component */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class name for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the button state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button state */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is the default state for the component */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class name for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the latest version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where it is used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the component has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the component was last used */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., load time, user interaction) */,
  "usage_details" TEXT /* Detailed usage information (e.g., specific pages or features where the component is used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the application is currently active */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Development status (e.g., In Development, Live) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred theme, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the button style */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the guideline */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guideline is currently active */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage code snippets for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_guidelines_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES button_styles ("style_id")
)
